model.tooltip: The model used for denoising the input latent.

seed.tooltip: The random seed used for creating the noise.

steps.tooltip: The number of steps used in the denoising process.

cfg.tooltip: The Classifier-Free Guidance scale balances creativity and adherence to the prompt. Higher values result in images more closely matching the prompt however too high values will negatively impact quality.

sampler_name.tooltip: The algorithm used when sampling, this can affect the quality, speed, and style of the generated output.

scheduler.tooltip: The scheduler controls how noise is gradually removed to form the image.

positive.tooltip: The conditioning describing the attributes you want to include in the image.

negative.tooltip: The conditioning describing the attributes you want to exclude from the image.

denoise.tooltip: The amount of denoising applied, lower values will maintain the structure of the initial image allowing for image to image sampling.

KSampler.name: KSampler
KSampler.description: Uses the provided model, positive and negative conditioning to denoise the latent image.

ckpt_name.tooltip: The name of the checkpoint (model) to load.

CheckpointLoaderSimple.name: CheckpointLoaderSimple
CheckpointLoaderSimple.description: Loads a diffusion model checkpoint, diffusion models are used to denoise latents.
output_tooltips: The model used for denoising latents.
The CLIP model used for encoding text prompts.
The VAE model used for encoding and decoding images to and from latent space.

clip.tooltip: The CLIP model used for encoding the text.

CLIPTextEncode.name: CLIPTextEncode
CLIPTextEncode.description: Encodes a text prompt using a CLIP model into an embedding that can be used to guide the diffusion model towards generating specific images.
output_tooltips: A conditioning containing the embedded text used to guide the diffusion model.

vae.tooltip: The VAE model used for decoding the latent.

VAEDecode.name: VAEDecode
VAEDecode.description: Decodes latent images back into pixel space images.

width.tooltip: The width of the latent images in pixels.

height.tooltip: The height of the latent images in pixels.

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent images in the batch.

EmptyLatentImage.name: EmptyLatentImage
EmptyLatentImage.description: Create a new batch of empty latent images to be denoised via sampling.

filename_prefix.tooltip: The prefix for the file to save. This may include formatting information such as %date:yyyy-MM-dd% or %Empty Latent Image.width% to include values from nodes.

SaveImage.name: SaveImage
SaveImage.description: Saves the input images to your ComfyUI output directory.

PreviewImage.name: PreviewImage
PreviewImage.description: Saves the input images to your ComfyUI output directory.

LoadImageOutput.name: LoadImageOutput
LoadImageOutput.description: Load an image from the output folder. When the refresh button is clicked, the node will update the image list and automatically select the first image, allowing for easy iteration.

model.tooltip: The diffusion model the LoRA will be applied to.

clip.tooltip: The CLIP model the LoRA will be applied to.

strength_model.tooltip: How strongly to modify the diffusion model. This value can be negative.

strength_clip.tooltip: How strongly to modify the CLIP model. This value can be negative.

LoraLoader.name: LoraLoader
LoraLoader.description: LoRAs are used to modify diffusion and CLIP models, altering the way in which latents are denoised such as applying styles. Multiple LoRA nodes can be linked together.

CLIPLoader.name: CLIPLoader
CLIPLoader.description:
[Recipes]

stable_diffusion: clip-l
stable_cascade: clip-g
sd3: t5 xxl/ clip-g / clip-l
stable_audio: t5 base
mochi: t5 xxl
cosmos: old t5 xxl
lumina2: gemma 2 2B
wan: umt5 xxl
 hidream: llama-3.1 (Recommend) or t5
omnigen2: qwen vl 2.5 3B

DualCLIPLoader.name: DualCLIPLoader
DualCLIPLoader.description:
[Recipes]

sdxl: clip-l, clip-g
sd3: clip-l, clip-g / clip-l, t5 / clip-g, t5
flux: clip-l, t5
hidream: at least one of t5 or llama, recommended t5 and llama
hunyuan_image: qwen2.5vl 7b and byt5 small
newbie: gemma-3-4b-it, jina clip v2

temporal_size.tooltip: Only used for video VAEs: Amount of frames to decode at a time.

temporal_overlap.tooltip: Only used for video VAEs: Amount of frames to overlap.

temporal_size.tooltip: Only used for video VAEs: Amount of frames to encode at a time.

temporal_overlap.tooltip: Only used for video VAEs: Amount of frames to overlap.

noise_mask.tooltip: Add a noise mask to the latent so sampling will only happen within the mask. Might improve results or completely break things depending on the model.

LoraLoaderModelOnly.name: LoraLoaderModelOnly
LoraLoaderModelOnly.description: LoRAs are used to modify diffusion and CLIP models, altering the way in which latents are denoised such as applying styles. Multiple LoRA nodes can be linked together.

destination.tooltip: The destination latent where frames will be replaced.

index.tooltip: The starting latent frame index in the destination latent where the source latent frames will be placed. Negative values count from the end.

source.tooltip: The source latent providing frames to insert into the destination latent. If not provided, the destination latent is returned unchanged.

resize_type.tooltip: Select how to resize: by exact dimensions, scale factor, matching another image, etc.

width.tooltip: Target width in pixels. Set to 0 to auto-calculate from height while preserving aspect ratio.

height.tooltip: Target height in pixels. Set to 0 to auto-calculate from width while preserving aspect ratio.

crop.tooltip: How to handle aspect ratio mismatch: 'disabled' stretches to fit, 'center' crops to maintain aspect ratio.

multiplier.tooltip: Scale factor (e.g., 2.0 doubles size, 0.5 halves size).

longer_size.tooltip: The longer edge will be resized to this value. Aspect ratio is preserved.

shorter_size.tooltip: The shorter edge will be resized to this value. Aspect ratio is preserved.

width.tooltip: Target width in pixels. Height auto-adjusts to preserve aspect ratio.

height.tooltip: Target height in pixels. Width auto-adjusts to preserve aspect ratio.

megapixels.tooltip: Target total megapixels (e.g., 1.0 ≈ 1024×1024). Aspect ratio is preserved.

match.tooltip: Resize input to match the dimensions of this reference image or mask.

crop.tooltip: How to handle aspect ratio mismatch: 'disabled' stretches to fit, 'center' crops to maintain aspect ratio.

multiple.tooltip: Resize so width and height are divisible by this number. Useful for latent alignment (e.g., 8 or 64).

scale_method.tooltip: Interpolation algorithm. 'area' is best for downscaling, 'lanczos' for upscaling, 'nearest-exact' for pixel art.

ResizeImageMaskNode.name: ResizeImageMaskNode
ResizeImageMaskNode.description: Resize an image or mask using various scaling methods.

MaskPreview.name: MaskPreview
MaskPreview.description: Saves the input images to your ComfyUI output directory.

eta.tooltip:
Stochastic strength of reverse-time SDE.
When eta=0, it reduces to deterministic ODE. This setting doesn't apply to ER-SDE solver type.

r.tooltip: Relative step size for the intermediate stage (c2 node)

SamplerSEEDS2.name: SamplerSEEDS2
SamplerSEEDS2.description:
This sampler node can represent multiple samplers:

seeds_2
- default setting

exp_heun_2_x0
- solver_type=phi_2, r=1.0, eta=0.0

exp_heun_2_x0_sde
- solver_type=phi_2, r=1.0, eta=1.0, s_noise=1.0

return_actual_sigma.tooltip:
Return the actual sigma value instead of the value used for interval checks.
This only affects results at 0.0 and 1.0.

seed.tooltip: The random seed used for creating the noise.

filename_prefix.tooltip: The prefix for the file to save. This may include formatting information such as %date:yyyy-MM-dd% or %Empty Latent Image.width% to include values from nodes.

ImageStitch.name: ImageStitch
ImageStitch.description:
Stitches image2 to image1 in the specified direction.
If image2 is not provided, returns image1 unchanged.
Optional spacing can be added between images.

GetImageSize.name: GetImageSize
GetImageSize.description: Returns width and height of the image, and passes it through unchanged.

SplitImageToTileList.name: SplitImageToTileList
SplitImageToTileList.display_name: Split Image into List of Tiles
SplitImageToTileList.description: Splits an image into a batched list of tiles with a specified overlap.

ImageMergeTileList.name: ImageMergeTileList
ImageMergeTileList.display_name: Merge List of Tiles to Image

model.tooltip: The model to train the LoRA on.

latents.tooltip: The Latents to use for training, serve as dataset/input of the model.

positive.tooltip: The positive conditioning to use for training.

batch_size.tooltip: The batch size to use for training.

grad_accumulation_steps.tooltip: The number of gradient accumulation steps to use for training.

steps.tooltip: The number of steps to train the LoRA for.

learning_rate.tooltip: The learning rate to use for training.

rank.tooltip: The rank of the LoRA layers.

optimizer.tooltip: The optimizer to use for training.

loss_function.tooltip: The loss function to use for training.

seed.tooltip: The seed to use for training (used in generator for LoRA weight initialization and noise sampling)

training_dtype.tooltip: The dtype to use for training. 'none' preserves the model's native compute dtype instead of overriding it. For fp16 models, GradScaler is automatically enabled.

lora_dtype.tooltip: The dtype to use for lora.

algorithm.tooltip: The algorithm to use for training.

offloading.tooltip: Offload model weights to CPU during training to save GPU memory.

existing_lora.tooltip: The existing LoRA to append to. Set to None for new LoRA.

bucket_mode.tooltip: Enable resolution bucket mode. When enabled, expects pre-bucketed latents from ResolutionBucket node.

bypass_mode.tooltip: Enable bypass mode for training. When enabled, adapters are applied via forward hooks instead of weight modification. Useful for quantized models where weights cannot be directly modified.

model.tooltip: The diffusion model the LoRA will be applied to.

lora.tooltip: The LoRA model to apply to the diffusion model.

strength_model.tooltip: How strongly to modify the diffusion model. This value can be negative.

bypass.tooltip: When enabled, applies LoRA in bypass mode without modifying base model weights. Useful for training and when model weights are offloaded.

lora.tooltip: The LoRA model to save. Do not use the model with LoRA layers.

prefix.tooltip: The prefix to use for the saved LoRA file.

steps.tooltip: Optional: The number of steps the LoRA has been trained for, used to name the saved file.

filename_prefix.tooltip: Prefix for the saved loss graph image.

folder.tooltip: The folder to load images from.
The folder to load images from.

LoadImageTextDataSetFromFolder.name: LoadImageTextDataSetFromFolder
LoadImageTextDataSetFromFolder.display_name: Load Image and Text Dataset from Folder

folder_name.tooltip: Name of the folder to save images to (inside output directory).

texts.tooltip: List of text captions to save.

folder_name.tooltip: Name of the folder to save images to (inside output directory).

SaveImageTextDataSetToFolder.name: SaveImageTextDataSetToFolder
SaveImageTextDataSetToFolder.display_name: Save Image and Text Dataset to Folder

shorter_edge.tooltip: Target length for the shorter edge.

longer_edge.tooltip: Target length for the longer edge.

factor.tooltip: Brightness factor. 1.0 = no change, <1.0 = darker, >1.0 = brighter.
Contrast factor. 1.0 = no change, <1.0 = less contrast, >1.0 = more contrast.

similarity_threshold.tooltip: Similarity threshold (0-1). Higher means more similar. Images above this threshold are considered duplicates.

columns.tooltip: Number of columns in the grid.

cell_width.tooltip: Width of each cell in the grid.

cell_height.tooltip: Height of each cell in the grid.

vae.tooltip: VAE model for encoding images to latents.

clip.tooltip: CLIP model for encoding text to conditioning.

texts.tooltip: List of text captions. Can be length n (matching images), 1 (repeated for all), or omitted (uses empty string).

latents.tooltip: List of latent dicts from MakeTrainingDataset.

conditioning.tooltip: List of conditioning lists from MakeTrainingDataset.

folder_name.tooltip: Name of folder to save dataset (inside output directory).

shard_size.tooltip: Number of samples per shard file.

folder_name.tooltip: Name of folder containing the saved dataset (inside output directory).

latents.tooltip: List of latent dicts to bucket by resolution.

conditioning.tooltip: List of conditioning lists (must match latents length).

output_tooltips: List of batched latent dicts, one per resolution bucket.
List of condition lists, one per resolution bucket.
ResolutionBucket.name: ResolutionBucket

CLIPTextEncodePixArtAlpha.name: CLIPTextEncodePixArtAlpha
CLIPTextEncodePixArtAlpha.description: Encodes text and sets the resolution conditioning for PixArt Alpha. Does not apply to PixArt Sigma.

ModelMergeWAN2_1.name: ModelMergeWAN2_1
ModelMergeWAN2_1.description: 1.3B model has 30 blocks, 14B model has 40 blocks. Image to video model has the extra img_emb.

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent images in the batch.

start_index.tooltip: Start time in seconds, can be negative to count from the end (supports sub-seconds).

TrimAudioDuration.name: TrimAudioDuration
TrimAudioDuration.description: Trim audio tensor into chosen time range.

SplitAudioChannels.name: SplitAudioChannels
SplitAudioChannels.description: Separates the audio into left and right channels.

JoinAudioChannels.name: JoinAudioChannels
JoinAudioChannels.description: Joins left and right mono audio channels into a stereo audio.

direction.tooltip: Whether to append audio2 after or before audio1.

AudioConcat.name: AudioConcat
AudioConcat.description: Concatenates the audio1 to audio2 in the specified direction.

merge_method.tooltip: The method used to combine the audio waveforms.

AudioMerge.name: AudioMerge
AudioMerge.description: Combine two audio tracks by overlaying their waveforms.

volume.tooltip: Volume adjustment in decibels (dB). 0 = no change, +6 = double, -6 = half, etc

duration.tooltip: Duration of the empty audio clip in seconds

sample_rate.tooltip: Sample rate of the empty audio clip.

channels.tooltip: Number of audio channels (1 for mono, 2 for stereo).

SkipLayerGuidanceSD3.name: SkipLayerGuidanceSD3
SkipLayerGuidanceSD3.description: Generic version of SkipLayerGuidance node that can be used on every DiT model.

image_interleave.tooltip: How much the image influences things vs the text prompt. Higher number means more influence from the text prompt.

HunyuanVideo15LatentUpscaleWithModel.name: HunyuanVideo15LatentUpscaleWithModel
HunyuanVideo15LatentUpscaleWithModel.display_name: Hunyuan Video 15 Latent Upscale With Model

tsr_k.tooltip:
Controls the rescaling strength.
Lower k produces more detailed results; higher k produces smoother results in image generation. Setting k = 1 disables rescaling.

tsr_sigma.tooltip:
Controls how early rescaling takes effect.
Larger values take effect earlier.

TemporalScoreRescaling.name: TemporalScoreRescaling
TemporalScoreRescaling.description:
[Post-CFG Function]
TSR - Temporal Score Rescaling (2510.01184)

Rescaling the model's score or noise to steer the sampling diversity.

FluxDisableGuidance.name: FluxDisableGuidance
FluxDisableGuidance.description: This node completely disables the guidance embed on Flux and Flux like models

FluxKontextImageScale.name: FluxKontextImageScale
FluxKontextImageScale.description: This node resizes the image to one that is more optimal for flux kontext.

model.tooltip: The model to use KV Cache on.

output_tooltips: The patched model with KV Cache enabled.
FluxKVCache.name: FluxKVCache
FluxKVCache.description: Enables KV Cache optimization for reference images on Flux family models.

model_diff.tooltip: The ModelSubtract output to be converted to a lora.

text_encoder_diff.tooltip: The CLIPSubtract output to be converted to a lora.

SkipLayerGuidanceDiT.name: SkipLayerGuidanceDiT
SkipLayerGuidanceDiT.description: Generic version of SkipLayerGuidance node that can be used on every DiT model.

SkipLayerGuidanceDiTSimple.name: SkipLayerGuidanceDiTSimple
SkipLayerGuidanceDiTSimple.description: Simple version of the SkipLayerGuidanceDiT node that only modifies the uncond pass.

Mahiro.name: Mahiro
Mahiro.description: Modify the guidance to scale more on the 'direction' of the positive prompt rather than the difference between the negative prompt.

audio_vae.tooltip: The Audio VAE model to use for encoding.
The Audio VAE model used for decoding the latent.

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent audio samples in the batch.

audio_vae.tooltip: The Audio VAE model to get configuration from.

stretch.tooltip: Stretch the sigmas to be in the range [terminal, 1].

terminal.tooltip: The terminal value of the sigmas after stretching.

image.tooltip: Image or video to condition the latent video on. Must be 8*n + 1 frames. If the video is not 8*n + 1 frames, it will be cropped to the nearest 8*n + 1 frames.

frame_idx.tooltip: Frame index to start the conditioning at. For single-frame images or videos with 1-8 frames, any frame_idx value is acceptable. For videos with 9+ frames, frame_idx must be divisible by 8, otherwise it will be rounded down to the nearest multiple of 8. Negative values are counted from the end of the video.

img_compression.tooltip: Amount of compression to apply on image.

crf.tooltip: Higher crf means lower quality with a smaller file size, lower crf means higher quality higher filesize.

filename_prefix.tooltip: The prefix for the file to save. This may include formatting information such as %date:yyyy-MM-dd% or %Empty Latent Image.width% to include values from nodes.

format.tooltip: The format to save the video as.

codec.tooltip: The codec to use for the video.

SaveVideo.name: SaveVideo
SaveVideo.description: Saves the input images to your ComfyUI output directory.

images.tooltip: The images to create a video from.

audio.tooltip: The audio to add to the video.

video.tooltip: The video to extract components from.

GetVideoComponents.name: GetVideoComponents
GetVideoComponents.description: Extracts all components from a video: frames, audio, and framerate.

duration.tooltip: Duration in seconds, or 0 for unlimited duration

strict_duration.tooltip: If True, when the specified duration is not possible, an error will be raised.

system_prompt.tooltip: Lumina2 provide two types of system prompts:Superior: You are an assistant designed to generate superior images with the superior degree of image-text alignment based on textual prompts or user prompts. Alignment: You are an assistant designed to generate high-quality images with the highest degree of image-text alignment based on textual prompts.

clip.tooltip: The CLIP model used for encoding the text.

output_tooltips: A conditioning containing the embedded text used to guide the diffusion model.
CLIPTextEncodeLumina2.name: CLIPTextEncodeLumina2
CLIPTextEncodeLumina2.description: Encodes a system prompt and a user prompt using a CLIP model into an embedding that can be used to guide the diffusion model towards generating specific images.

video_frame_offset.tooltip: The amount of frames to seek in all the input videos. Used for generating longer videos by chunk. Connect to the video_frame_offset output of the previous node for extending a video.

mask_1.tooltip: Mask for the first speaker, required if using two audio inputs.

mask_2.tooltip: Mask for the second speaker, required if using two audio inputs.

motion_frame_count.tooltip: Number of previous frames to use as motion context.

pose_start.tooltip: Start step to use pose conditioning.

pose_end.tooltip: End step to use pose conditioning.

pose_video.tooltip: Video used for pose conditioning. Will be downscaled to half the resolution of the main video.

output_tooltips: Empty latent of the generation size.
WanSCAILToVideo.name: WanSCAILToVideo

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent images in the batch.

QuadrupleCLIPLoader.name: QuadrupleCLIPLoader
QuadrupleCLIPLoader.description:
[Recipes]

hidream: long clip-l, long clip-g, t5xxl, llama_8b_3.1_instruct

freq_cutoff.tooltip: Number of frequency indices around center to consider as low-frequency

FreSca.name: FreSca
FreSca.description: Applies frequency-dependent scaling to the guidance

eta.tooltip: Controls the scale of the parallel guidance vector. Default CFG behavior at a setting of 1.

norm_threshold.tooltip: Normalize guidance vector to this value, normalization disable at a setting of 0.

momentum.tooltip: Controls a running average of guidance during diffusion, disabled at a setting of 0.

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent images in the batch.

generate_audio_codes.tooltip: Enable the LLM that generates audio codes. This can be slow but will increase the quality of the generated audio. Turn this off if you are giving the model an audio reference.

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent images in the batch.

ReferenceTimbreAudio.name: ReferenceTimbreAudio
ReferenceTimbreAudio.description: This node sets the reference audio for ace step 1.5

dotall.tooltip: When enabled, the dot (.) character will match any character including newline characters. When disabled, dots won't match newlines.

count.tooltip: Maximum number of replacements to make. Set to 0 to replace all occurrences (default). Set to 1 to replace only the first match, 2 for the first two matches, etc.

RegexReplace.name: RegexReplace
RegexReplace.description: Find and replace text using regex patterns.

ReferenceLatent.name: ReferenceLatent
ReferenceLatent.description: This node sets the guiding latent for an edit model. If the model supports it you can chain multiple to set multiple reference images.

TCFG.name: TCFG
TCFG.description:
TCFG – Tangential Damping CFG (2503.18137)

Refine the uncond (negative) to align with the cond (positive) for improving quality.

model.tooltip: The model to apply context windows to during sampling.

context_length.tooltip: The length of the context window.

context_overlap.tooltip: The overlap of the context window.

context_schedule.tooltip: The stride of the context window.

context_stride.tooltip: The stride of the context window; only applicable to uniform schedules.

closed_loop.tooltip: Whether to close the context window loop; only applicable to looped schedules.

fuse_method.tooltip: The method to use to fuse the context windows.

dim.tooltip: The dimension to apply the context windows to.

freenoise.tooltip: Whether to apply FreeNoise noise shuffling, improves window blending.

cond_retain_index_list.tooltip: List of latent indices to retain in the conditioning tensors for each window, for example setting this to '0' will use the initial start image for each window.

split_conds_to_windows.tooltip: Whether to split multiple conditionings (created by ConditionCombine) to each window based on region index.

output_tooltips: The model with context windows applied during sampling.
ContextWindowsManual.name: ContextWindowsManual

model.tooltip: The model to apply context windows to during sampling.

context_length.tooltip: The length of the context window.

context_overlap.tooltip: The overlap of the context window.

context_schedule.tooltip: The stride of the context window.

context_stride.tooltip: The stride of the context window; only applicable to uniform schedules.

closed_loop.tooltip: Whether to close the context window loop; only applicable to looped schedules.

fuse_method.tooltip: The method to use to fuse the context windows.

freenoise.tooltip: Whether to apply FreeNoise noise shuffling, improves window blending.

output_tooltips: The model with context windows applied during sampling.
WanContextWindowsManual.name: WanContextWindowsManual
WanContextWindowsManual.description: Manually set context windows for WAN-like models (dim=2).

preserve_wrapper.tooltip: When enabled, will delegate to an existing model function wrapper if it exists. Generally should be left enabled.

start_sigma.tooltip: First sigma that these options will be in effect.

end_sigma.tooltip: Last sigma that these options will be in effect.

nerf_tile_size.tooltip: Allows overriding the default NeRF tile size. -1 means use the default (32). 0 means use non-tiling mode (may require a lot of VRAM).

ChromaRadianceOptions.name: ChromaRadianceOptions
ChromaRadianceOptions.description: Allows setting advanced options for the Chroma Radiance model.

model.tooltip: The model to add EasyCache to.

reuse_threshold.tooltip: The threshold for reusing cached steps.

start_percent.tooltip: The relative sampling step to begin use of EasyCache.

end_percent.tooltip: The relative sampling step to end use of EasyCache.

model.tooltip: The model to add LazyCache to.

reuse_threshold.tooltip: The threshold for reusing cached steps.

start_percent.tooltip: The relative sampling step to begin use of LazyCache.

end_percent.tooltip: The relative sampling step to end use of LazyCache.

LazyCache.name: LazyCache
LazyCache.description: A homebrew version of EasyCache - even 'easier' version of EasyCache to implement. Overall works worse than EasyCache, but better in some rare cases AND universal compatibility with everything in ComfyUI.

ScaleROPE.name: ScaleROPE
ScaleROPE.description: Scale and shift the ROPE of the model.

aspect_ratio.tooltip: The aspect ratio for the output dimensions.

megapixels.tooltip: Target total megapixels. 1.0 MP ≈ 1024×1024 for square.

ResolutionSelector.name: ResolutionSelector
ResolutionSelector.description: Calculate width and height from aspect ratio and megapixel target. Useful for setting up Empty Latent Image dimensions.

output_tooltips: Clean encoded start images, used to replace the noisy start of the model output latents
Kandinsky5ImageToVideo.name: Kandinsky5ImageToVideo

start_frame_count.tooltip: Number of latent frames to normalize, counted from the start

reference_frame_count.tooltip: Number of latent frames after the start frames to use as reference

NormalizeVideoLatentStart.name: NormalizeVideoLatentStart
NormalizeVideoLatentStart.description: Normalizes the initial frames of a video latent to match the mean and standard deviation of subsequent reference frames. Helps reduce differences between the starting frames and the rest of the video.

start_x.tooltip: Normalized X coordinate (0-1) for start position.

start_y.tooltip: Normalized Y coordinate (0-1) for start position.

end_x.tooltip: Normalized X coordinate (0-1) for end position.

end_y.tooltip: Normalized Y coordinate (0-1) for end position.

track_spread.tooltip: Normalized distance between tracks. Tracks are spread perpendicular to the motion direction.

bezier.tooltip: Enable Bezier curve path using the mid point as control point.

mid_x.tooltip: Normalized X control point for Bezier curve. Only used when 'bezier' is enabled.

mid_y.tooltip: Normalized Y control point for Bezier curve. Only used when 'bezier' is enabled.

interpolation.tooltip: Controls the timing/speed of movement along the path.

track_mask.tooltip: Optional mask to indicate visible frames.

ImageCompare.name: ImageCompare
ImageCompare.description: Compares two images side by side with a slider.

fragment_shader.tooltip: GLSL fragment shader source code (GLSL ES 3.00 / WebGL 2.0 compatible)

size_mode.tooltip: Output size: 'from_input' uses first input image dimensions, 'custom' allows manual size

images.tooltip: Images are available as u_image0-4 (sampler2D) in the shader code

floats.tooltip: Floats are available as u_float0-4 in the shader code

ints.tooltip: Ints are available as u_int0-4 in the shader code

output_tooltips: Available via layout(location = 0) out vec4 fragColor0 in the shader code
Available via layout(location = 1) out vec4 fragColor1 in the shader code
Available via layout(location = 2) out vec4 fragColor2 in the shader code
Available via layout(location = 3) out vec4 fragColor3 in the shader code
GLSLShader.name: GLSLShader
GLSLShader.description: Apply GLSL ES fragment shaders to images. u_resolution (vec2) is always available.

model.tooltip: The diffusion model the LoRA will be applied to.

clip.tooltip: The CLIP model the LoRA will be applied to.

strength_model.tooltip: How strongly to modify the diffusion model. This value can be negative.

strength_clip.tooltip: How strongly to modify the CLIP model. This value can be negative.

LoraLoaderBypass.name: LoraLoaderBypass
LoraLoaderBypass.description: Apply LoRA in bypass mode. Unlike regular LoRA, this doesn't modify model weights - instead it injects the LoRA computation during forward pass. Useful for training scenarios.

LoraLoaderBypassModelOnly.name: LoraLoaderBypassModelOnly
LoraLoaderBypassModelOnly.description: Apply LoRA in bypass mode. Unlike regular LoRA, this doesn't modify model weights - instead it injects the LoRA computation during forward pass. Useful for training scenarios.

ColorToRGBInt.name: ColorToRGBInt
ColorToRGBInt.description: Convert a color to a RGB integer value.

model.tooltip: The model to apply NAG to.

nag_scale.tooltip: The guidance scale factor. Higher values push further from the negative prompt.

nag_alpha.tooltip: Blending factor for the normalized attention. 1.0 is full replacement, 0.0 is no effect.

output_tooltips: The patched model with NAG enabled.
NAGuidance.name: NAGuidance
NAGuidance.description: Applies Normalized Attention Guidance to models, enabling negative prompts on distilled/schnell models.

bboxes.tooltip: Optional bounding boxes for more accurate detections. Required for multi-person detection.

output_tooltips: Keypoints in OpenPose frame format (canvas_width, canvas_height, people)
SDPoseKeypointExtractor.name: SDPoseKeypointExtractor
SDPoseKeypointExtractor.description: Extract pose keypoints from images using the SDPose model: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/SDPose/tree/main/checkpoints

scale.tooltip: Multiplier for the bounding box area around each detected face.

force_square.tooltip: Expand the shorter bbox axis so the crop region is always square.

output_tooltips: Face bounding boxes per frame, compatible with SDPoseKeypointExtractor bboxes input.
SDPoseFaceBBoxes.name: SDPoseFaceBBoxes

output_width.tooltip: Width each crop is resized to.

output_height.tooltip: Height each crop is resized to.

padding.tooltip: Extra padding in pixels added on each side of the bbox before cropping.

output_tooltips: All crops stacked into a single image batch.
